title: viola tricolor var. flavescens
intro: Viola tricolor var. flavescens, also known as the yellow pansy or heart's ease, is a variety of the common pansy plant, characterized by its bright yellow and purple flowers. Traditionally, Viola tricolor var. flavescens has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as soothing skin irritations, reducing anxiety and stress, and supporting respiratory health. Herbal preparations of Viola tricolor var. flavescens can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and it is also used in topical applications, such as creams and ointments, to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
